caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a high bun and braids sits in a studio setting, wearing a dark green t-shirt with red and white text that reads "DETERMINATION JAMAICA". She is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a black boom arm, appearing to speak or listen intently. Behind her is a black backdrop featuring the logo "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white, along with the phrases "It's A Unique Hustle", "CAST", "out It!", and "Us". To the left, a framed photo of a man is visible on the wall, and on the table in front of her, there are small containers and more "BOSS TALK 101" branding. Across the frames, the woman remains in the same position, with only slight shifts in her facial expression and head tilt as she engages with the recording equipment.
